subject: Lane_02 Identity Lock — canon expert awareness
summary: Lane_02 identity locked vĩnh viễn. Lane_03 awareness: future Lane_02 reviews + cross-Lane handoffs maintain LANE02-* prefix in all artifacts.
note_to_lane_03: Per LAW_N13, Lane_03 ratify post-migration. Identity Lock này không conflict với LAW_N13 — extends multi-repo governance with Lane_02-specific identity discipline.
